description: Style Note Take formal dressing to the next level with this pair of trousers from mark taylor. The fall of the fabric gives a slim shape while offering all day comfort. Pair it with crisp formal shirt, a blazer, stylish cufflinks and leather shoes. Product Details Black striped trousers made of polyester viscose blended fabric, has a flat front, two side pockets, two back pockets with loop and button closures, comfortable waistband with belt loops and a zipper and button closure Material and Care Polyester and viscose blend Wash care Delicate machine wash Do not bleach or wring by hand Dry in shade Warm iron Size and Fit Regular Fit The model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
